title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 33-A.  MENTAL HEALTH COURT

TREATMENT PROGRAMS

§5351.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Mental Health Court Treatment Act".

Acts 2013, No. 346, §1.
